title: Material Tools
body:
Information
---
Have you ever wondered why ores lost their similar shapes but their tools didn't? Me neither honestly, but I fixed it anyway.

Versions
---
This works in current versions, and due to file paths not changing, should work as far back as 1.14

I have no plans to make this for older versions, but it's not hard to do yourself.

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
I haven't gotten around to reorganizing my github setup yet sorry

This tweak not for you?
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
